event_definitions.description: User visited the home page with demo event tracking buttons
User browsed the product catalog page
User visited the about page with contact form and social links
User clicked Add to Cart on a product card
User clicked Buy Now on a product card
User clicked Track Custom Event button on the home page demo
User clicked Track Add to Cart demo button on the home page
event_definitions.match: event == '$autocapture' && element_text == 'Track Add to Cart' && page_path == '/'

event_definitions.description: User clicked Track Feature Usage demo button on the home page
User clicked Track File Download demo button on the home page
User submitted the contact form on the about page
User clicked View Documentation on the about page
User clicked a social media button (Twitter, GitHub, LinkedIn) on the about page
User clicked the Login button in the header
User clicked the Sign Up button in the header
User clicked the Products link in the header navigation
User clicked the About link in the header navigation

product_browsing.description: Browsing and interacting with products in the catalog

event_tracking_demo.description: Using the home page demo buttons to test event tracking

engagement.description: Interactions showing deeper interest: docs, social, contact form

navigation.description: Navigating between pages in the app

conditions: User adds first product to cart
Cart interaction confirms the app is functional
aha_moment.description: The first Add to Cart click shows the user the core product interaction works — they see the cart count update and the tracking event fire

new.description: First-time visitor, only viewed the home page

exploring.description: Visitor browsing multiple pages, testing demo buttons

engaged.description: Visitor interacting with products and forms

funnels.name: Visitor to Buyer
funnels.description: From first page view to product purchase

glossary.product: An item in the product catalog with name, price, and category (e.g., Next.js Masterclass, React Hooks Guide)
glossary.cart: A shopping cart interaction tracked when user clicks Add to Cart on a product
glossary.purchase: A buy interaction tracked when user clicks Buy Now on a product
glossary.demo_button: One of the home page buttons that demonstrates SDK event tracking capabilities

predefined.name: Product Browsers
predefined.description: Visitors who viewed the products page at least once

predefined.name: Cart Users
predefined.description: Visitors who added at least one product to cart

predefined.name: Buyers
predefined.description: Visitors who clicked Buy Now on at least one product

critical.description: Severe drop in core product interactions

high.description: Significant drop in page views or engagement

objectives.goal: Increase the share of visitors who browse products and add items to cart
investigation_hints: Check which products get the most Add to Cart clicks vs Buy Now clicks
Analyze if product hover (product view) predicts cart addition
Compare engagement between visitors who arrive at home first vs direct to products
